generation_rule: For no retained occurrence, generate the two ungenerated-extra classes. For proper or complete retained coverage, generate the product of exact-once or duplicated multiplicity with absence or presence of ungenerated extra occurrences.
grammar_boundary: All representations of any registered nonempty finite generation trace, classified by coverage of its generated occurrences, multiplicity of retained occurrences, and addition of occurrences outside that trace.

candidates.exact_form: Trace representation has none coverage, not-applicable retained multiplicity, and no-extra.
Trace representation has none coverage, not-applicable retained multiplicity, and has-extra.
Trace representation has proper coverage, once retained multiplicity, and no-extra.
Trace representation has proper coverage, once retained multiplicity, and has-extra.
Trace representation has proper coverage, duplicated retained multiplicity, and no-extra.
Trace representation has proper coverage, duplicated retained multiplicity, and has-extra.
Trace representation has complete coverage, once retained multiplicity, and no-extra.
Trace representation has complete coverage, once retained multiplicity, and has-extra.
Trace representation has complete coverage, duplicated retained multiplicity, and no-extra.
Trace representation has complete coverage, duplicated retained multiplicity, and has-extra.
